info.title: RentNest API
info.description:
Complete API documentation for RentNest - Rental Property Marketplace

Base URL: https://rentnest-api.vercel.app/api

## Authentication
- Register/Login to get a JWT token
- Token is auto-set to `token` variable
- Protected routes require `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` header

## Variables
- `base_url`: API base URL (default: https://rentnest-api.vercel.app)
- `token`: JWT token (auto-set after login/register)
- `propertyId`: Store after creating/looking up a property
- `rentalRequestId`: Store after creating a rental request
- `paymentId`: Store after creating payment intent
- `transactionId`: Store after creating payment intent
- `reviewId`: Store after creating a review
- `categoryId`: Store after creating/looking up a category
- `userId`: Store for admin operations

get.description: Check if the API is running

post.description: Register a new user. Role can be 'tenant' or 'landlord'. Token is auto-set to {{token}}.
Login with email and password. Token is auto-set to {{token}}.

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user's profile. Requires JWT token.
Get all property categories. Public endpoint.
List available properties with filtering and pagination. All query params are optional. Public endpoint.
Get property details by ID. Includes landlord, category, and all reviews. Public endpoint.

post.description: Create a new property listing. Requires LANDLORD role.

description.example: A beautiful 2-bedroom apartment with modern amenities in the heart of Gulshan.

put.description: Update a property listing. Can only update own properties. Requires LANDLORD role.

delete.description: Delete a property listing. Can only delete own properties. Requires LANDLORD role.

get.description: View all rental requests for the landlord's properties. Requires LANDLORD role.

patch.description: Approve or reject a rental request. Status must be 'approved' or 'rejected'. Requires LANDLORD role.

post.description: Submit a rental request for a property. Requires TENANT role.

message.example: I am interested in renting this property.

data.message: I am interested in renting this property.

get.description: Get all rental requests for the authenticated user (tenant). Includes property and landlord details.
Get a single rental request by ID. Accessible by both tenant (owner) and landlord (property owner). Includes payments.

post.description: Create a Stripe PaymentIntent for an approved rental request. Returns client_secret for frontend confirmation. Requires TENANT role.
Confirm a payment after frontend Stripe confirmation. Marks payment as COMPLETED and rental request as ACTIVE. Requires TENANT role.

get.description: Get all payments for the authenticated tenant. Includes rental request and property details.
Get payment details by ID. Includes rental request, property, and landlord info. Accessible by the payment owner (tenant).
Get all reviews. Optionally filter by propertyId. Public endpoint.

post.description: Create a review for a property. Requires TENANT role and an active/completed rental request.

get.description: Get all reviews written by the authenticated tenant. Requires TENANT role.
Get paginated list of all users with counts. Requires ADMIN role.

patch.description: Ban or unban a user. Cannot ban other admins. Requires ADMIN role.

get.description: Get ALL properties (including unavailable). Includes landlord and category. Requires ADMIN role.
Get ALL rental requests with tenant, landlord, and property details. Requires ADMIN role.

post.description: Create a new property category. Requires ADMIN role.

delete.description: Delete a property category. Requires ADMIN role.
